title: Characteristics Of Kiran Mazumdar Shaw - 799 Words | Bartleby
excerpts:
Section Title: Characteristics Of Kiran Mazumdar Shaw > You'll be redirected
Content:
In my opinion Kiran Mazumdar Shaw is a perfect example of an effective leader. Indian businesswoman and Entrepreneur Kiran Mazumdar Shaw is the Chairman and Managing Director of Biocon, Country’s leading Biotech Company. In 2004, Mazumdar Shaw was named the richest woman in India with a net worth of $1.2 Billion. She dared to dream in a country like India with a capital of 10000INR and a brewery degree in hand. She started in the backyard of a suburban house in Bangalore in 1978 as a small operation of enzyme extraction. She recognised the future potential of the biotechnology industry when not many people in India knew about it. Biocon India has been her brainchild as she transformed it from a small entity to the largest biopharma company in India.

title: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw - Kiran Mazumdar - Shaw
excerpts:
Section Title: Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw > Executive Chairperson,  Biocon Limited
Content:
Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw is a pioneer of the biotechnology industry in India and the founder of the country’s leading biotechnology enterprise, Biocon. Named among TIME magazine’s 100 most influential people in the world, Kiran is recognized as a thought leader who has made her country proud by building a globally recognised biopharmaceutical enterprise. Biocon is committed to innovation and delivering best-in-class, affordable therapeutics to patients across the globe.
